D4 Colorimetry L3 Apply Reference

The Munsell Tree

slide the value and watch a hue-by-chroma page of the irregular Munsell colour tree fill in

Munsell built the first perceptually spaced colour order: Value (lightness) climbs the trunk, Chroma reaches outward, Hue circles around. Branches of different length make a lopsided tree.

Slide the Value to turn the pages of the tree. Each page lays Hue around and Chroma outward; the ragged outer edge is the gamut limit (shown here in an sRGB / CIELAB approximation of Munsell's renotation).
